name: Lisas Baked French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the eggs, yolks, and melted vanilla ice cream in a bowl until well combined.
2. Arrange 8 bread slices in a buttered 9x13-inch baking dish.
3. Pour half of the custard mixture over the first layer of bread.
4. Add a second layer of bread slices.
5. Pour the remaining custard mixture over all the bread slices.
6. Sprinkle with nutmeg and cinnamon.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until set.
8. Mix the maple syrup with the toasted pecans.
9. Warm the mixture on low heat and serve over the toast.
